file.description: Binary file stream in multipart field named file

post.description: Sends a one-time password to the provided email if the account is not already registered. Cooldown is enforced to prevent abuse.

value.message: OTP sent to email if it is not already registered
Validation failed

429.description: Cooldown/rate limit active for OTP resend

value.message: Please wait before requesting another OTP

post.description: Creates a user and default tenant using email OTP verification. Returns access and refresh tokens in both body and cookies.

value.message: Invalid or expired OTP
Email is already registered
Invalid email or password

get.description: Fetches current user profile and tenant memberships from access token context.

value.message: Unauthorized: access token missing
Unauthorized: invalid or expired access token

post.description: Generates a fresh access token bound to a selected tenant. Required before tenant-scoped endpoints unless activeTenantId is already present in JWT.

403.description: User is not a member of the requested tenant

post.description: Accepts refresh token in request body or refreshToken cookie and rotates both tokens.

400.description: Refresh token missing from body and cookies

post.description: Resets password for a user identified by the reset token.
Logs out current user session and clears auth cookies. Accepts optional refresh token in body.

value.message: Logged out successfully

post.summary: Create Razorpay order for plan subscription
post.description: Creates a subscription intent/order. Requires tenant context and owner/admin membership role.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

200.description: Subscription initiated and Razorpay order created

400.description: Validation failure, basic-plan subscribe, or active subscription edge case

value.message: Tenant already has an active subscription
Basic plan cannot be subscribed in this manner

403.description: Forbidden for non owner/admin or tenant membership mismatch

post.summary: Verify payment and activate tenant subscription

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

400.description: Validation failure, bad signature, or invalid subscription state

value.message: Payment verification failed
Subscription is not in created state

post.description: Public endpoint for payment events. Signature validation is mandatory via x-razorpay-signature header.

value.message: Invalid signature

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

post.description: Owner/admin can invite admin/member users. Includes anti-spam cooldown and duplicate-invite safeguards.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

value.message: Invitation email sent successfully

value.message: User has already joined this tenant
User is the owner of this tenant and has already joined

429.description: Invite cooldown or duplicate invite in progress

value.message: You are sending invitations too fast. Please wait a moment.
User already invited. Please wait for acceptance.

400.description: Invalid token format or user already a member

value.message: You are already a member of this tenant

403.description: Invite token email mismatch edge case

value.message: This invitation was sent to a different email address. Please create an account with the invited email or login with the correct account first, then try again.

post.description: Only owner/admin can remove members. Tenant owner cannot be removed.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

value.message: Member removed successfully
